Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case Pending Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FITNESS INTERNATIONAL, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case Pending Arbitration.

Off calendar, parties have stipulated to submit to binding arbitration per filing on November 21, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
